title: Pig Mod - Plus Edition
description: This is the sequal to Pig Mod. But mostly made for Pig Mod. Adds things for what were going to be in Pig Mod 1.3.1 and so on.
body:
# PIG MOD WILL CONTINUE TO SEE UPDATES, V3.5 IS THE FINAL VERSION.
# Pigifyer Presents: Pig Mod - Plus Edition!
Incompatible with Pig Mod, but heres the [Pig Mod Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/pig-mod) anyway. This mod adds things such as the unreleased Pig Steel from 1.3.1. Also like Tryno=Pig, planned for 1.4. And some new items such as **Pig Blo*D**, **Pig-mas Tree**, and a new structure- **Tryno-En**. Also theres a Bacon Log+ and Bacon Planks+, Bacon Door, and some new guns and tools.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

</details>
